# PixelGuard Deployment Results

Fill this file while running the deployment runbook. These are the exact values to copy into the final Google Form and X submission post.

## Network

- Network: X Layer mainnet
- Chain ID: 196
- RPC used: https://rpc.xlayer.tech
- Explorer: https://www.okx.com/web3/explorer/xlayer
